calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Ali Hassan, an individual, and Rose Investment Group, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Johnny D. Knadler, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Badrieh Nijem, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Ali Hassan, an individual, or Rose Investment Group, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Fraud was filed on October 9, 2018, and personally served on defendant Ali Hassan, an individual, on October 18, 2018.
Default as to defendant Ali Hassan, an individual, was entered on February 11, 2019.
Plaintiff's Summons & Complaint were personally served on defendant Rose Investments Group, Inc. on March 24, 2019.
Default as to defendant Rose Investments Group, Inc. was entered on June 21, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 28, 2020.

Plaintiff Badrieh Nijem submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Promissory Note dated Octoer 6, 2017.......................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Sales Agreement dated August 20, 2016......................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Badrieh Nijem, an individual, and against the defaulted defendants Ali Hassan, an individual, and Rose Investment Group, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $57,014.14.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,591.00.
Attorney Fees - $10,000.00.
Costs - $680.00.

Total - $76,285.14.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
